headline: Anew Climate Joins Carbon Measures to Advance Global Carbon Accounting Standards and Policies Supporting Market-Based Solutions
summary: HOUSTON, TX / ACCESS Newswire / March 23, 2026 / Anew Climate, a global leader in low-carbon fuels and climate solutions, today announced it has joined Carbon Measures, a cross-industry coalition working to develop a new global carbon accounting framework ...

headline: Lindian brings Kangankunde closer to production with Tipume camp milestone
summary: Lindian Resources Ltd (ASX:LIN, OTC:LINIF) has marked a key step forward at its flagship Kangankunde rare earths project in Malawi, bringing its on-site accommodation camp online and enabling the next phase of construction and workforce mobilisation. The Tipume accommodation camp is now...
